description_long: This is a modern, structured baseball cap with a medium-height, rounded crown and a curved brim. The cap is predominantly a solid gray color, featuring a subtle woven texture throughout the fabric. On the brim, there is a visible sticker label, and a small tag is attached to the side of the crown, suggesting branding or sizing information. The back of the cap has an adjustable black snapback closure, allowing for a customizable fit. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, with no additional decorative elements. The cap appears suitable for casual urban wear and offers sun protection with its curved brim.
description: A gray, structured baseball cap with a curved brim, snapback closure, and minimal branding details. The design is clean and functional, ideal for everyday urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved brim, central crown seam, and a sticker label on the brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side tag and the curvature of the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black adjustable snapback closure and the rounded crown.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the smooth, uninterrupted crown and the brim's profile.
